notes.title: Dungeon duel hit/crit/combo readability refresh (P1)
highlights: Refined hit-confirm ring SVG to strengthen center-lock clarity in rapid hit confirmation moments.
Refined crit-echo SVG to improve crit burst carryover readability during combo streak windows.
Synced dungeon duel manifest/index wording and source-map comments while keeping runtime keys stable.

notes.title: Weekly and dungeon high-frequency feedback touch-up (P1)
highlights: Added weekly waves-focus badge SVG to support faster status recognition in recurring bounty loops.
Added dungeon combo-chain SVG overlay and synced source mapping, manifest entries, and visual asset export keys.

notes.title: Dungeon and weekly high-frequency feedback fill (P1)
highlights: Added dungeon crit echo and hit confirm ring SVG overlays for clearer repeated hit/combo feedback.
Added weekly pending status badge SVG and synced dungeon/weekly source mapping plus manifest entries.
Updated visual asset exports and manifest index wording to keep key-level handoff and inventory consistent.

notes.title: Dungeon affix banner mode unification (P1)
highlights: Added classic/vortex affix banner helper SVG decos to visually align with existing realm frame language.
Synced dungeon duel source mapping, visual asset export keys, manifest entries, and index wording for consistent asset inventory.

notes.title: Dungeon duel realm frame accents (P1)
highlights: Added classic/vortex realm frame SVG accents for existing dungeon mode display slots.
Synced dungeon duel source mapping, visual asset export keys, manifest entries, and manifest index wording.

notes.title: Dungeon duel feedback closure (P1)
highlights: Added stagger pulse and finisher seal SVG feedback decals for dungeon duel combat readability.
Synced dungeon duel source mapping, visual asset export keys, manifest list, and manifest index wording.

notes.title: Weekly bounty feedback loop accents (P1)
highlights: Added weekly streak and completion status badge SVGs for lightweight weekly-bounty feedback closure.
Synced weekly bounty source mapping, manifest assets, and index wording to keep the UI art pipeline consistent.

notes.title: Dungeon combat feedback decals (P0)
highlights: Added hit flash, critical burst, and guard break SVG decals for dungeon combat feedback.
Synced dungeon duel data mapping and manifest entries for non-runtime loading fallback.

notes.title: UI asset pipeline baseline
highlights: Established src/data/*Ui.ts single-source mapping.
Added manifest index, category view, and conventions.
Added handoff, import profiles, quality checklist, and version history.

notes.title: Cross-team delivery alignment
highlights: Added task-level handoff manifest with programHook keys.
Added import profiles for PNG icon and SVG panel assets.

notes.title: Localization and palette reference
highlights: Added zh/en UI glossary with manifest cross-references.
Added non-runtime palette swatch SVG aligned with gacha decor accents.

notes.title: Weekly bounty and offline readability pack
highlights: Added bounty claim burst badge for weekly reward feedback.
Added offline summary badge and transition shine strip for settlement readability.
Registered offline settlement module/manifest in index, categories, and conventions.

notes.title: Empty state illustration polish
highlights: Repaired empty gear/pet/unlock SVG captions and aligned typography with HUD palette.
Consolidated empty-state mapping to gear/pet/unlock and removed stale weekly placeholder linkage.
